description: Format the raw text draft of an Incident Response Playbook from ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ransomware_playbook_raw.txt into a structured DOCX file using ONLYOFFICE Document Editor. The title 'Ransomware Incident Response Playbook' should be center-aligned, bold, and 24pt. The 'Last Updated: October 2024' paragraph should be right-aligned. The 'CONFIDENTIAL: Internal Security Operations Center (SOC) Use Only' notice must be in italics. All four phase headers (e.g., 'Phase 1: Preparation') must be bold and 16pt. Convert the pipe-delimited 'Severity Classification' section into a document table. Save the final document to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ir_playbook_formatted.docx.
